chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-80 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection as at A 2. For orders on CMA No.1118/2024 3. For orders on CMA No.1119/2024 4. For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 M/s. Shaikh Jawaid Mir, Samreen Ehtesham and Agha Atta Muhammad Khan, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Ashraf Ali Shah, advocate for the respondent --------- Counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as the parties have patched up the matter outside the Court which fact is confirmed by learned counsel for the respondent. Order accordingly. JUDGE Nadir*
